title: White Darkness
description: white-black themed minimalistic clean pvp pack
body:
Hello , welcome to my second public Texturepack:).

The texturepack is very subtle and has a white to black theme.

I would say that the texturepack is designed more for PvP but you can use it for everything else very well.

The texturepack is with the mods:
"
1.) Apple Skin
2.) Cosmetic Armor Reworked
3.) Just Enough Items
4.) Just Enough Resources
5.) Mod Menu
6.) Sophisticated Backpacks
"
compatible.
